name: Context Continuity
description: Retrieve related context from multiple simulated prior sessions

seeds.content: Session 1: Set up the project with Hono framework on Cloudflare Workers
Session 2: Added authentication using Lucia Auth with GitHub OAuth provider
Session 3: Migrated database from SQLite to Turso for edge deployment
Session 4: Implemented rate limiting at 60 requests per minute per user
Session 5: Added WebSocket support for real-time notifications

queries.query: what is the current tech stack and architecture
